text: People are playing volleyball on the beach beside the ocean.
A pair of kitchen scissors and a beer sit on a wooden table near a pan of pasta.
A red and a black Ducati parked on the street next to each other.
A person on a beach flying a kite.
Girl perform tricks on a horse at a horse show.
Older man is holding his black cat in his lap
A jet flies in the distance with the moon in the background.
A white bath tub sitting in a room next to a toilet.
A black cat sitting in the middle of a room.
Clothing is strewn about in a motel room.
